runs.brief_en: Early June 22 (Taipei): Musk marked Father's Day with family posts, pushed UK grooming-gang/media-coverage critiques (RT + 💯), demoed Grok Imagine, quoted skepticism on puberty blockers vs social-media age rules, boosted a California Starlink launch, and shared lighter video and history takes.
runs.brief_zh: 台北6/22凌晨：馬斯克父親節發文、轉推並認同英國性侵醜聞與媒體雙標評論、展示Grok Imagine、質疑青春期阻斷與社群年齡規定矛盾、轉推加州Starlink發射，並分享影片與歷史趣談。

runs.brief_en: Elon amplified UK grooming gangs and media double standards (retweeted Darth Powell, replied 💯 to rape gangs post, shared related video on Islamist threats), posted Grok Imagine dancing kittens video, said AI will exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years, demanded 'Execute them' in UK baby murder case, called Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax proposals, endorsed 'McCarthy was right' on stripping terrorists' citizenship, joked 'Full access' on vibecoding, retweeted Starlink launch, shared Father's Day tributes and history replies.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準（轉推 Darth Powell、💯 回覆強暴團伙貼文、分享相關伊斯蘭威脅影片），貼出 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片，稱 AI 4-5 年內將超越全人類智慧，要求處決英國虐兒兇手，痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，認同「麥卡錫沒錯」剝奪恐怖分子公民權，幽默評「完全存取權」vibecoding，轉推 Starlink 發射、分享父親節致敬與歷史回覆。

items_flat.title_en: Musk amplifies UK grooming-gang and media double-standard critiques
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準批評
items_flat.summary_en: Musk retweeted @VladTheInflator's post contrasting a single Edinburgh knife-attack labeled terrorism with the industrialized rape of ~250,000 British girls by grooming gangs that authorities downplayed. Hours later he replied '💯' to another post by the same account detailing torture, 'red rooms,' miscarriages and politicians burying the scandal. On June 22 he further amplified a video highlighting Islamist threats, Tommy Robinson support and related UK issues.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 @VladTheInflator 貼文，對比單一愛丁堡持刀攻擊被貼上恐怖主義標籤，卻對 grooming 團伙工業化強暴約25萬英國女孩、當局長期掩蓋的醜聞保持沉默。數小時後他對同一帳號另一則描述酷刑、「紅房」、流產及政客掩蓋的貼文回「💯」。22日進一步分享影片，突顯伊斯蘭威脅、Tommy Robinson 支持及相關英國議題。

links.label: Elon Musk video share (UK/Islamist issues) on X

items_flat.title_en: Musk retweets Falcon 9 Starlink launch from California
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推 Falcon 9 從加州發射 Starlink 衛星
items_flat.summary_en: SpaceX announced Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink satellites from California with video and photos. Musk retweeted the post to his followers without additional commentary, amplifying the successful mission.
items_flat.summary_zh: SpaceX 宣布 Falcon 9 從加州發射 24 顆 Starlink 衛星，附影片與照片。馬斯克轉推該貼文給追隨者，未加評論，放大此次成功任務。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'Execute them' in horrific UK baby murder case
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克在英國嬰兒謀殺慘案中說「處決他們」
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'Execute them' to a post detailing the case of a British teacher couple (adoptive gay parents) convicted of murdering and severely sexually abusing their 1-year-old adopted son Preston, with evidence of prolonged torture that media reports allegedly downplayed by omitting the parents' orientation.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆「Execute them」，針對一則貼文詳述英國教師伴侶（領養的同性戀父母）被判謀殺並嚴重性侵其1歲領養兒 Preston 的案件，證據顯示長期酷刑，媒體報導據稱刻意隱瞞父母性向。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: AI will exceed the sum of all human intelligence in 4-5 years
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：AI 將在 4-5 年內超越全人類智慧總和
items_flat.summary_en: Musk stated: 'AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.' The comment came amid ongoing discussion of rapid AI progress and xAI's trajectory.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克表示：「AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.」此言論出現在討論 AI 快速進展與 xAI 軌跡的脈絡中。
items_flat.musk_quote: AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: AI 可能在 4 或 5 年內超越全人類智慧的總和。

items_flat.title_en: Musk posts Father's Day tributes to family and Karl Marx's dad
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克發文父親節致敬家人與卡爾·馬克思的父親
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted 'Happy Father’s Day!' (massive engagement). He also quote-posted a letter from Karl Marx's father criticizing his son's lifestyle and lack of work, adding 'Karl’s Dad was cool.' Existing reports indicate he replied with a heart emoji to his mother Maye Musk's post.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克貼文「父親節快樂！」（極高互動）。他也轉推卡爾·馬克思父親寫給兒子的信，信中批評馬克思的生活方式與不工作，並加註「Karl’s Dad was cool」。先前報導顯示他對母親 Maye Musk 的貼文回覆愛心表情。

links.label: Elon Musk Happy Father's Day on X
Elon Musk Karl's Dad quote-post on X

items_flat.title_en: Musk demos Grok Imagine with dancing kittens video prompt
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克展示 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片提示
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted a Grok Imagine-generated video of mitten-wearing kittens dancing and singing 'we’re kittens with mittens' with joyful movements. He shared the full prompt and wrote 'Your kids will love this video!'
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克貼出 Grok Imagine 生成的影片：戴手套的小貓跳舞唱「we’re kittens with mittens」，動作歡快。他分享完整提示並寫「Your kids will love this video!」
items_flat.musk_quote:
Your kids will love this video!
Grok Imagine prompt:
The kittens with mittens start dancing and singing “we’re kittens with mittens” with joyful, energetic movements and playful expressions.
items_flat.musk_quote_zh:
你的孩子會喜歡這段影片！
Grok Imagine 提示：
戴手套的小貓開始跳舞並唱著「we’re kittens with mittens」，動作歡快充滿活力，表情俏皮。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: blocking puberty at 11 but allowing social media makes no sense
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：11歲可阻斷青春期卻要到16歲才准用社群媒體說不通
items_flat.summary_en: Quote-posting educator Katharine Birbalsingh's criticism that children can block puberty at 11 yet are told to avoid social media until 16, Musk wrote simply: "Makes no sense."
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推教育家 Katharine Birbalsingh 批評：孩子11歲就能阻斷青春期，卻被告知要到16歲才能用社群媒體，他只寫：「Makes no sense.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk shares Charlie Kirk legacy conversion video
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克分享 Charlie Kirk 遺產轉變影片
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted (without added text) the video originally from Soldiersgirl (@Hisbabygirl68) of a man who said he was glad Charlie Kirk was murdered, then admitted Kirk's videos and debates changed his life completely, reconciled his family, and made Kirk his hero.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克無文字純分享 Soldiersgirl (@Hisbabygirl68) 原影片：一名男子曾說很高興 Charlie Kirk 被謀殺，後來承認 Kirk 的影片與辯論徹底改變他的人生、讓家庭和解，並視 Kirk 為英雄。

items_flat.title_en: Musk calls Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax-the-rich proposals
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，針對「向富人課稅」提案
items_flat.summary_en: Replying to a post quoting Rep. Ro Khanna suggesting a 5% one-time tax on Elon Musk could fund universal child care at $10/day and earlier comments about taxing billionaires for student debt, Musk wrote: 'He’s such an evil liar.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 回覆引用眾議員 Ro Khanna 建議對 Elon Musk 課徵 5% 一次性稅就能資助全美每天 10 美元托兒服務，以及先前「向億萬富翁課稅還學生債」言論，馬斯克寫：「He’s such an evil liar.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'McCarthy was right' on stripping citizenship from terrorists
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：「麥卡錫沒錯」支持剝奪恐怖分子公民權
items_flat.summary_en: Agreeing with a post about the DOJ using a 1952 law to denaturalize a Somali immigrant who joined al-Shabaab terrorists shortly after naturalization in 2007, Musk wrote simply: 'McCarthy was right.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 同意一則貼文指出 DOJ 利用 1952 年法律，取消 2007 年歸化後數月即加入 al-Shabaab 恐怖組織的索馬利移民公民權，馬斯克僅寫：「McCarthy was right.」

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'Works every time' agreeing with Bukele
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：「每次都有效」同意 Bukele
items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted President Nayib Bukele's post 'It’s a very simple concept, really.' (with image) and replied 'Works every time' — amplifying Bukele's governance or security approach.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推總統 Nayib Bukele 的貼文「It’s a very simple concept, really.」（附圖），並回「Works every time」——放大 Bukele 的治理或安全方針。

items_flat.title_en: Musk jokes electric rockets are impossible
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克開玩笑：電動火箭不可能
items_flat.summary_en: Replying in a discussion thread, Musk quipped 'Unfortunately, electric rockets are impossible' — a characteristic physics joke amid his space-focused activity.
items_flat.summary_zh: 在討論串回覆中，馬斯克幽默表示「Unfortunately, electric rockets are impossible」——典型的物理學笑話，呼應他專注太空的動態。
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 不幸的是，電動火箭是不可能的。

items_flat.title_en: Musk reacts "Wow" to viral video clip
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted a one-word reaction — "Wow" — with video media amplifying a clip from Thaïs d'Escufon that quickly gained millions of views.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克僅以一字「Wow」回應並附上影片，放大來自 Thaïs d'Escufon 的病毒影片，迅速獲得數百萬觀看。

items_flat.title_en: Musk muses on William the Conqueror invasion timing
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克談論威廉征服者入侵時機
items_flat.summary_en: In a reply to Joe Lonsdale, Musk said he loves niche history and argued William the Conqueror would probably have lost had he invaded a year earlier — 'timing is everything.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 回覆 Joe Lonsdale 時，馬斯克表示熱愛冷門歷史，並認為如果威廉征服者早一年入侵，可能會失敗——「時機就是一切」。
items_flat.musk_quote:
True! I love niche history. 
Timing is everything. William would probably have lost if he had invaded a year earlier.
items_flat.musk_quote_zh:
沒錯！我熱愛冷門歷史。
時機就是一切。如果威廉早一年入侵，可能會失敗。

items_flat.title_en: Musk comments 'Full access' 😂 on viral vibecoding meme
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克幽默評論病毒「vibecoding」迷因「完全存取權」😂
items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted a popular 'Day 1 of vibecoding' image (chaotic/funny AI-assisted coding screenshot) with the comment '“Full access” 😂' — widely interpreted as a joke about giving AI coding tools broad permissions.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推熱門「Day 1 of vibecoding」圖片（混亂/搞笑的 AI 輔助編碼截圖），並評論「“Full access” 😂」——普遍被解讀為給 AI 編碼工具廣泛權限的笑話。

你的孩子會喜歡這段影片！
Grok Imagine 提示：
戴手套的小貓開始跳舞並唱著「we’re kittens with mittens」，動作歡快充滿活力，表情俏皮。

xai_x_platform.title_en: Musk comments 'Full access' 😂 on viral vibecoding meme
xai_x_platform.title_zh: 馬斯克幽默評論病毒「vibecoding」迷因「完全存取權」😂
xai_x_platform.summary_en: Musk quote-posted a popular 'Day 1 of vibecoding' image (chaotic/funny AI-assisted coding screenshot) with the comment '“Full access” 😂' — widely interpreted as a joke about giving AI coding tools broad permissions.
xai_x_platform.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推熱門「Day 1 of vibecoding」圖片（混亂/搞笑的 AI 輔助編碼截圖），並評論「“Full access” 😂」——普遍被解讀為給 AI 編碼工具廣泛權限的笑話。

brief_en: Elon amplified UK grooming gangs and media double standards (retweeted Darth Powell, replied 💯 to rape gangs post, shared related video on Islamist threats), posted Grok Imagine dancing kittens video, said AI will exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years, demanded 'Execute them' in UK baby murder case, called Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax proposals, endorsed 'McCarthy was right' on stripping terrorists' citizenship, joked 'Full access' on vibecoding, retweeted Starlink launch, shared Father's Day tributes and history replies.
brief_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準（轉推 Darth Powell、💯 回覆強暴團伙貼文、分享相關伊斯蘭威脅影片），貼出 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片，稱 AI 4-5 年內將超越全人類智慧，要求處決英國虐兒兇手，痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，認同「麥卡錫沒錯」剝奪恐怖分子公民權，幽默評「完全存取權」vibecoding，轉推 Starlink 發射、分享父親節致敬與歷史回覆。
